{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].
